code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a polar graph paper diagram with marked point markers
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with keys "answer" and "annotation".
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with key "answer".
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_integer: set "answer" to the requested integer value
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_point_p: set "annotation" to the pixel point [x,y] at point P
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_points_pq: set "annotation" to an object with exactly the keys "P" and "Q"; each value must be that labeled point's pixel point [x,y]
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_matching_point_set: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel points [x,y], one for each marked point counted in the answer

radius_readout_value: What is the polar radius of point P?
Read the radius coordinate of point P.
Find the polar radius of point P.
What radius value is shown for point P?
Give the polar radius of point P.
angle_readout_value: What is the polar angle of point P in degrees?
Read the angle coordinate of point P in degrees.
Find the polar angle of point P in degrees.
What angle value is shown for point P in degrees?
Give the polar angle of point P in degrees.
radius_difference_value: What is the absolute difference between the polar radii of P and Q?
Find the difference between the radius coordinates of P and Q.
How far apart are P and Q in polar radius value?
Read both radius coordinates and give their absolute difference.
What is the positive difference between the polar radii of P and Q?
angle_difference_value: What is the smaller angle difference between OP and OQ in degrees?
Find the smaller angular difference between points P and Q in degrees.
Read both angle coordinates and give their smaller difference in degrees.
What is the smaller polar angle difference between P and Q?
Give the smaller angle from ray OP to ray OQ in degrees.
radius_value_point_count: How many marked points have radius {target_value}?
Count the marked points whose polar radius is {target_value}.
How many plotted points are on the radius-{target_value} circle?
How many marked points lie on the ring labeled {target_value}?
Count the plotted markers with polar radius {target_value}.
angle_value_point_count: How many marked points have angle {target_value} degrees?
Count the marked points on the {target_value} degree spoke.
How many plotted points are at polar angle {target_value} degrees?
How many marked points lie on the spoke labeled {target_value} degrees?
Count the plotted markers with polar angle {target_value} degrees.

scene:polar_graph_paper_scene.object_description: a polar graph paper diagram with marked point markers
